mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, payment_no, order_no, transaction_id, channel, notify_status, notify_count, last_notify_time, paid_amount, mch_id, app_id, raw_data, error_msg, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM pay_callback_record
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND payment_no LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.paymentNo}, '%')
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.orderNo}, '%')
AND transaction_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.transactionId}, '%')
AND channel LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.channel}, '%')
AND notify_status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.notifyStatus}, '%')
AND last_notify_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.lastNotifyTime}, '%')
AND paid_amount LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.paidAmount}, '%')
AND mch_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.mchId}, '%')
AND app_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.appId}, '%')
AND create_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.createTime}, '%')
